Actions.Text: REFERRED TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS

Title: Relates to the tangible property credit component of the brownfield redevelopment tax credit
Summary: Extends the tangible property credit component of the brownfield redevelopment tax credit for certain qualified sites which contain 40% open space and 25% affordable housing units.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the tax law, in relation to the tangible property credit component of the brownfield redevelopment tax credit
